notes: PG-185 Module Settings — Tickets. Implements /tickets/sla-policies as a 5-card bento (SLA policies [REUSES ticketConfig.slaPolicy], duplicate detection, required fields, tags, automation with 21 controls). Adds 4 new Prisma models (TicketDuplicateRule, TicketRequiredField, TicketTag, TicketAutomationSetting) with hardening migration (colorToken CHECK, autoCloseIdleDays bounds 0..365, AI defaults restated false, defaultSlaPolicyId FK ON DELETE SET NULL). ticketSettings tRPC router registered in appRouter; category-1 toggles wired in ticket.router.ts via ticket-automation.ts (loadTicketAutomation, normalizeTicketSubject, trimTicketDescription, resolveDefaultSlaPolicyId, assertCanDeleteTicket, notifyTicketReassignment, notifyTicketResolved, notifyTicketEscalated). 4 new notification types (ticket_reassigned, ticket_resolved, ticket_duplicate_suspected, ticket_auto_closed). Category-2 follow-ups registered on IFC-310 (2 paths: auto-close cron + required-field enforcer) and IFC-312 (6 paths: AI chains). Settings sidebar + settings-search entries added. /settings/tickets legacy redirect. Page docs co-changed (PAGE_MAP, sitemap, dependency-chains). PRD addendum added for PG-185.
dependencies_verified: PG-178 (Completed, sprint-16) — ModuleSettingsLayout foundation available but deliberately NOT used (playbook §1 mandates bento grid).
PG-182 (Completed, sprint-17) — ContactSettings pattern cloned for TicketSettings shape.
PG-183 (Completed, sprint-17) — AccountSettings page-level pattern cloned (PageHeader + bento + SectionHeader).
PG-184 (Completed, sprint-17) — DealSettings used as nearest clone template (re-export pattern, hardening migration shape).
PG-173 (Completed, sprint-16) — ticketConfigRouter.slaPolicy + SLAPolicyManager exist; slaPolicy sub-router REUSED via re-export.

validation_results.stdout_hash: ticket-router=27 | ticket-settings-wiring=3 | notifications=85 | routing=45 | search=4 | stats=10 | perf=14 | config-router=8 | TicketSettingsContent=9 | total=205/205

gate_results.note: NEEDS_HUMAN methodology waiver. Dev-server measurement: Perf 0.87 / A11y 0.94 — accessibility PASSES 0.90 threshold; performance misses by 3 pts (dev-server ships unminified JS + next-devtools 138KB). Production `next start` build succeeds but Lighthouse headless returns NO_FCP because useRequireAuth() redirects without Supabase session cookies; authenticated pipeline (lighthouserc.authenticated.js + lhci-auth.js) requires NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL/KEY which are not available to the agent. PG-184 (identical module-settings pattern, same playbook, same component stack) was accepted Completed without a production Lighthouse artifact — same methodology limitation applied. Core Web Vitals (dev-server): FCP 290ms (<1s target), LCP 2422ms (<=2.5s target), TBT 17ms (<300ms target), CLS 0 (<0.1 target). URL added to lighthouserc.js for future automated runs.
